===''Pokémon the Series''===
[[File:Clemont anime.png|thumb|250px|Clemont in {{aniseries|XY}}]]
{{main|Clemont (anime)}}
Clemont appears in ''[[Pokémon the Series: XY]]'' as a {{ashfr|traveling companion}} for {{Ash}}, alongside {{an|Serena}} and his sister {{an|Bonnie}}. He and Bonnie first met Ash in ''[[XY001|Kalos, Where Dreams and Adventures Begin!]]'', but they officially began traveling with him in ''[[XY003|A Battle of Aerial Mobility!]]''. He also reappeared in ''[[Pokémon Journeys: The Series]]'' for a [[JN103|two-part]] [[JN104|episode]] set in Kalos.
